steps.title: Keep verb and object together
steps.content: The verb compiled is followed directly by its object, climate data from several sites in Puerto Rico's Luquillo Mountains. Standard English does not place punctuation between a verb and its direct object.

steps.title: Reject added punctuation
steps.content: Choice A inserts a comma between the verb and object. Choice B keeps the verb connected to its object with no punctuation. Choice C incorrectly inserts a colon. Choice D incorrectly ends the sentence before the object appears. The answer is B.
